description: You are a system administrator responsible for a legacy enterprise backup script. Following a recent incident, the script was found to report 'SUCCESS' for empty backups, hang if previously interrupted, skip files with spaces in their names, calculate 0-byte totals, and leave unencrypted sensitive data in /tmp/ on error. The codebase and test suite are located at /home/ga/workspace/backup_system/. Fix these five Bash scripting issues so the script handles errors, edge-case filenames, and interruptions gracefully. Ensure all tests in 'pytest tests/test_backup.py' pass.
